title: Branches
description:
Configuration object for branches.

Properties:
• branch_canopy ({ canopy, mangrove_canopy, acacia_canopy, ... })
• branch_length (int)
• branch_altitude_factor (object)

branch_canopy.title: Branch Canopy
branch_canopy.description:
Configuration object for the canopy.

Properties:
• canopy ({ canopy_decoration, canopy_offset, min_width, ... })
• mangrove_canopy
• acacia_canopy ({ canopy_size, simplify_canopy })
• cherry_canopy ({ trunk_width })
• fancy_canopy ({ height, radius })
• mega_canopy ({ base_radius, core_width, simplify_canopy })
• mega_pine_canopy ({ base_radius, core_width })
• pine_canopy ({ base_radius })
• ... and 2 more properties

branch_altitude_factor.title: Branch Altitude Factor
branch_altitude_factor.description: Altitude at which branches can spawn, relative to the tree height.
